typeProperties.script:
source(output(
        OccupationId as short,
        OccupationTitle as string
    ),
    allowSchemaDrift: true,
    validateSchema: false,
    isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
    errorHandlingOption: 'stopOnFirstError') ~> OLE_DB_Source
